markdownRemark.html:
Toolbar

Lets continue with our Toolbar component, it will have a searchbar and a button to add games to the list.

Searchbar

Here is where things get interesting, we will have a case where we there are two sibling components (Table and Toolbar) comunicating information to each other using a parent (MainPage), so on this case remember we can’t communicate upwards, so there are a few options we can use, one I tend to use are the callback functions.

From the parent component you send a prop to Toolbar which is then read by Searchbar, the problem is

Conclusion

See you on the next post.

Sincerely,

Eng Adrian Beria.
